0.text: Diffuse emphysematous changes in the upper lobes of both lungs

2.text: Increased density consistent with parenchymal fibrosis causing structural distortion and volume loss in both lung apices

3.text: Parenchymal nodule measuring 4.7 mm in the middle lobe of the right lung

4.text: Parenchymal nodule measuring 3.5 mm in the anterobasal segment of the left lower lobe
